activities.observation: Hybrid solar inverter INV-01 observed operating normally after being powered on. Battery priority mode remained active for farm electrical supply.
Papaya tree PLT-PAP-0002 observed bearing multiple developing fruits during routine agricultural inspection.
An unidentified bee colony was observed attached to branches of mango tree PLT-MNG-0001 during routine field observation.
An unidentified caterpillar was observed attached to the trunk of mango tree PLT-MNG-0001 during routine agricultural inspection. Species identification was not performed.
Balcony environmental sensor HZ-02-HTC-0001 recorded a temperature of 26.0°C and relative humidity of 71% during routine environmental monitoring.
